content: Schema-conformance: 00-frame.json/00-deps.json valid, trail directory shape matches trail-schema.md. Pass.
Dependency-resolution-recorded (Rule 3): 00-deps.json present, roles match dispatch. Pass.
Law-conformance: Law 4 -- no domain boundary crossed (Colony-wide governance docs, ceo-owned by precedent). Pass.

evolve-colony.md step 4 compliance: git status --short confirms zero writes outside this trail's own directory -- nothing reached a live root file or catalog/. Pass, mandatory regardless of anything else.

EC-011 pattern applied correctly to a doc twin (CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md), not just marketplace.json -- proposal 3 explicitly avoids copy-pasting the Claude-native path into the Codex-native file, which would have created the exact staleness EC-010 already flagged. Pass.

Item 1 (.clinerules) not silently built despite being explicitly requested -- flagged instead with a documented, specific rationale (toolchain mismatch, persistence-layer duplication, retired-project precedent) and an alternative offered. This is the correct move under evolve-colony's HIL gate: routing correctly identified this needed a human call it doesn't have authority to make unilaterally, not a finding against completeness.
